subject: Re: bathroom
body:
yes, you don't want to lay in the tub at stare at a toilet and wet shower, also without a door the shower is usually cold in new york.. remind zeff that hte floors in the bath should be heated.  I don't have the floor plan , also the phone number of the hotel,, 


----- Original Message ----
From: nadia marcinkova <nadja2102@yahoo.com>
To: J. Epstein <jeeproject@yahoo.com>
Sent: Monday, March 12, 2007 7:17:41 AM
Subject: Re: bathroom


The wall covering the wc / shower with the doors ? 
I moved rooms ( 207 now )

"J. Epstein" <jeeproject@yahoo.com> wrote:
needs a door on toilet,maybe frosted glass or mirror ,, same for shower.. the wall could disappear. I',m fine


----- Original Message ----
From: nadia marcinkova <nadja2102@yahoo.com>
To: Jeffrey E Epstein <jeeproject@yahoo.com>
Sent: Monday, March 12, 2007 6:26:16 AM
Subject: bathroom


Let me know you are ok, please.. 
 
I am sending some bathroom renderings and my father's floor plan.
( He made a mistake and put a table by the balcony door but the rest works )
I will check with Doug whether the radiator by the bathtub window in fact really can not be moved or removed..
